mapper.select: SELECT ANY_VALUE(mml.`level`) as `level`,ANY_VALUE( mml.`name`) AS `name`, COUNT( mm.id) AS num FROM eb_merchant_member_level mml LEFT JOIN `eb_merchant_member` mm on mm.`level` = mml.`level` and mm.is_logoff = 0 and mm.mer_id = #{merId} LEFT JOIN eb_user u on u.id = mm.uid WHERE mml.mer_id = #{merId} AND mml.is_del = 0 GROUP BY mml.`level` ORDER BY `level`;
